group.Description: Group assignment based on UCLA Loneliness Scale score

Levels.Lonely: Participant met the loneliness cut-off on the UCLA Loneliness Scale
Levels.Non-Lonely: Participant did not meet the loneliness cut-off on the UCLA Loneliness Scale

ucla-ls.Description: Total score on the UCLA Loneliness Scale (Version 3), a 20-item self-report measure of subjective feelings of loneliness and social isolation. Higher scores indicate greater loneliness.

age.Description: Age of the participant at the time of testing

handedness.Description: Laterality quotient computed from the Edinburgh Handedness Inventory, ranging from -1 (fully left-handed) to +1 (fully right-handed).

ses.Description: Categorical indicator of socioeconomic status, operationalised here as years of completed education.

ethnicity.Description: Self-reported ethnic or geographic-cultural background based on birth continent of parents and grandparents. One or more of the following categories, separated by a comma when more than one applies (mixed background): 'Europe', 'East Asia', 'South-East Asia', 'South Asia', 'West Asia and North Africa', 'North America', 'South and Central America'.

bsi53_somatisation.Description: Mean item score on the Somatisation subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Items are rated on a 5-point scale (0 = not at all, 4 = extremely); higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_obsessive_compulsive.Description: Mean item score on the Obsessive-Compulsive subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_interpersonal_sensitivity.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Interpersonal Sensitivity subscale
bsi53_interpersonal_sensitivity.Description: Mean item score on the Interpersonal Sensitivity subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_depression.Description: Mean item score on the Depression subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_anxiety.Description: Mean item score on the Anxiety subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_hostility.Description: Mean item score on the Hostility subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_phobic_anxiety.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Phobic Anxiety subscale
bsi53_phobic_anxiety.Description: Mean item score on the Phobic Anxiety subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_paranoid_ideation.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Paranoid Ideation subscale
bsi53_paranoid_ideation.Description: Mean item score on the Paranoid Ideation subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_psychoticism.Description: Mean item score on the Psychoticism subscale of the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items). Higher scores indicate greater distress.

bsi53_gsi.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Global Severity Index
bsi53_gsi.Description: Global Severity Index from the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items): mean item score across all 53 items. Higher scores indicate greater overall psychological distress.

bsi53_psdi.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Positive Symptom Distress Index
bsi53_psdi.Description: Positive Symptom Distress Index from the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items): mean intensity of symptoms endorsed at non-zero levels. Higher scores indicate greater distress intensity.

bsi53_pst.LongName: Brief Symptom Inventory-53 Positive Symptom Total
bsi53_pst.Description: Positive Symptom Total from the Brief Symptom Inventory (53 items): number of items endorsed at a non-zero level.

lsns6_family.LongName: Lubben Social Network Scale-6 family subscale
lsns6_family.Description: Sum score for the family items of the abbreviated Lubben Social Network Scale (LSNS-6). Higher scores indicate stronger family social ties.

lsns6_friends.LongName: Lubben Social Network Scale-6 friends subscale
lsns6_friends.Description: Sum score for the friends items of the abbreviated Lubben Social Network Scale (LSNS-6). Higher scores indicate stronger friend social ties.

lsns6_total.LongName: Lubben Social Network Scale-6 total score
lsns6_total.Description: Total sum score on the abbreviated Lubben Social Network Scale (LSNS-6). Scores range from 0 to 30; lower scores indicate greater risk of social isolation.

gad7_total.Description: Total score on the Generalised Anxiety Disorder 7-item scale (GAD-7). Scores range from 0 to 21; higher scores indicate more severe anxiety symptoms.

pss10_total.Description: Total score on the 10-item Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10). Scores range from 0 to 40; higher scores indicate greater perceived stress.

phq9_total.Description: Total score on the Patient Health Questionnaire 9-item depression scale (PHQ-9). Scores range from 0 to 27; higher scores indicate more severe depressive symptoms.

exclude.Description: Flag indicating whether the participant should be excluded from analyses (e.g., due to data quality or protocol deviations).
